description: My car was rear-ended while waiting at a traffic signal. The other driver admitted fault.
Heavy rain caused water to enter my basement and damage furniture.
A customer slipped on a wet floor in my store and suffered an injury.
Someone broke into my parked vehicle and stole my laptop.
A tree fell on my garage during last night's storm.
The contractor damaged my neighbor's fence while working on my property.
I have called three times already and nobody has responded. My vehicle is unusable and I need help immediately.
The kitchen pipe burst and flooded part of the house.
If this matter is not resolved soon, I will consult my attorney and consider legal action.
There was damage during the incident, but I am not sure whether it was caused by the delivery truck or by the storm.
